orig_text: The way to determine the number of iLBC frames is to count the total number of octets within the RTP packet, and divide the octet count by the number of expected octets per frame (32/50 per frame).
correct_text: The way to determine the number of iLBC frames is to count the total number of octets within the RTP packet, and divide the octet count by the number of expected octets per frame (38/50 per frame).
notes: Sections 2 and 3.1 both note that the octets per frame for the 20 ms frame length is 38, but section 3.2 incorrectly states 32. https://webrtc.github.io/webrtc-org/license/ilbc-freeware/ supports 38 being the correct packetized size for the 20 ms frame length.
